description_long: This armchair features a boxy, modern design with a deep seat and straight, angular lines. The main body, including the seat, backrest, and armrests, is upholstered in a dark, subtly textured fabric that gives it a contemporary look. Four thick, vertical wooden posts form the legs and frame, extending above the armrests and backrest, providing a sturdy and visually striking contrast to the dark upholstery. The armrests are wide and flat, matching the height of the backrest, and the seat is spacious, suggesting comfort and support. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments such as parks, plazas, or public waiting areas. The design is minimalist, with no visible cushions or decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with dark textured upholstery and thick, vertical wooden posts as legs and frame, offering a sturdy and minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, straight wooden posts and the full height of the backrest, with the dark fabric upholstery visible between the frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrests, and the vertical wooden posts extending above the armrest level.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide seat, straight armrests, and the symmetrical arrangement of the wooden posts framing the chair.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the armrest and the wooden post structure, emphasizing the chair's boxy profile.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, flat, and boxy with wood frame and fabric upholstery
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, straight, and boxy with full fabric upholstery
attribute_leg_type: thick, vertical wooden posts extending above seat level
